nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Let's cut to it, {{playerName}}. My client put up {{statLine}} last year. We both know what that's worth on the open market.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: We value {{npcPlayerName}} highly. {{offerAmount}} over {{offerYears}} years reflects that.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Those are impressive numbers. What's he looking for?

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: {{teamCity}} has budget constraints. We're thinking more in the range of—

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: That's... in the ballpark. But we were hoping for something closer to market value. Can you stretch the years?

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: He wants top-5 money at his position. We're talking {{askingPrice}} minimum. Anything less and we test free agency.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: With all due respect, that's insulting. My client has options. Don't waste our time.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: We can add a year. {{offerAmount}} over {{offerYears}} years with a club option.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: That's our best offer. Take it or leave it.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: If that's where we are, we'll revisit this later. Good luck in free agency.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: You're right, let me rework the numbers. How about we meet in the middle?

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: {{npcPlayerName}} loves playing in {{teamCity}}. He'd love to stay — but we need something fair.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: We appreciate his loyalty. {{offerAmount}} over {{offerYears}} years.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: We know he wants to stay. How about a slight hometown discount? We'll make it up in no-trade clauses.

deal_made.description: Loyal player re-signs with a smile.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: My client has two years left, but we'd like to lock in an extension now. Stability matters to him.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: We'd love to keep him long-term. What are you thinking?

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Let's revisit this closer to the deadline. We're still evaluating the roster.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Four years, fair market value. He's earned it with his consistency.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: That works for us. Let's get the paperwork started.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Three years with a mutual option for the fourth. Protects both sides.
